	<style type="text/css">
		
		.top-page-background-color {
			background-color: #F8F8F8;
		}
		:root {
			--article-thumbnail-size: 70px;
			--company-tag-side-padding: 10px;
			--company-tag-vertical-padding: 2px
		}
		
		.contents{
		    margin: auto;
		    width: 1240px;
		}
		
		.contents .contents-main {
		    float: left;
		    width: 950px;
		}
		
		.search-event-link-area {
			display: flex;
		}
		.contents .search-area {
			width: 65%;
			background: #FFF;
			border: 1px solid #CECECE;
			border-radius: 4px;
		}
		
		.contents .event-link-area {
			display: flex;
			flex-direction: column;
			justify-content: end;
			gap: calc((100% - 210px) / 2);
			background-color: #ececec;
			width: 33%;
			height: auto;
			margin: 0;
			margin-left: auto;
		}
		.contents .event-link-area p {
			text-align: center;
			font-size: 18px;
			font-weight: bold;
		}
		.contents .event-link-area ul li {
			float: initial;
			width: auto;
			height: 70px;
			line-height: 70px;
			margin: 0 10px 10px 10px;
		}
		.contents .event-link-area ul li:before {
			content: '';
			display: inline-block;
			border-style: solid;
			border-width: 10px 0 10px 15px;
			border-color: transparent transparent transparent #FFF;
			width: 0;
			height: 0;
			position: absolute;
			margin-top: 25px;
			margin-left: 20px;
		}
		.contents .event-link-area ul li a {
			outline-offset: -10px;
			outline: 1px solid white;
			font-size: 16px;
		}
		
		.contents .event-link-area-triple {
			display: flex;
			flex-direction: column;
			justify-content: end;
			gap: calc((100% - 235px) / 2);
			background-color: #ececec;
			width: 33%;
			height: auto;
			margin: 0;
			margin-left: auto;
		}
		.contents .event-link-area-triple p {
			text-align: center;
			font-size: 18px;
			font-weight: bold;
		}
		.contents .event-link-area-triple ul li {
			float: initial;
			width: auto;
			height: 50px;
			line-height: 50px;
			margin: 0 10px 10px 10px;
		}
		.contents .event-link-area-triple ul li:before {
			content: '';
			display: inline-block;
			border-style: solid;
			border-width: 10px 0 10px 15px;
			border-color: transparent transparent transparent #FFF;
			width: 0;
			height: 0;
			position: absolute;
			margin-top: 15px;
			margin-left: 20px;
		}
		.contents .event-link-area-triple ul li a {
			outline-offset: -10px;
			outline: 1px solid white;
			font-size: 16px;
			width: -webkit-fill-available;
			padding-block:unset;
		}
		
		.twin-heading{
			margin-bottom: 25px;
		}
		
		.twin-heading .twin-title {
		    font-size: 26px;
		    text-align: center;
		    color: #555;
		    font-weight: bold;
		    margin-bottom: 14px;
		}
		
		.twin-heading .twin-caption{
			font-size: 18px;
		    text-align: center;
		    font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif;
		    color: #00b2b2;
		    font-weight: bold;
		}
		
		#first-slider,
		#first-slider .swiper-container {
			height: 520px;
			width: 1240px;
		}
		
		#first-slider .photo img {
			width: 1240px !important;
			height: 520px !important;
		}
		
		.see-more-btn {
			border: 1px solid #DDD;
			border-radius: 25px;
			padding-left: 65px;
			padding-right: 65px;
			font-size: 22px;
			color: #555;
			background: url(/assets/pc/images/icon_btn_triangle.png) no-repeat #fff;
			background-size: 10px 10px;
			background-position: right 15px top 50%;
		}
		.see-more-btn:hover {
			box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #DDD;
			transition: box-shadow 0.25s ease;
		}
		#not-event {
			text-align: center;
			font-weight: bold;
		}
		.contents-margin {
			margin-top: 106px;
		}
		.link-js {
			cursor: pointer;
		}
		.tag li {
		    font-size: 11px;
		    margin: 0 2px 5px 2px;
		    min-width: 70px;
		    padding: 2px 10px;
		    margin-bottom: 6.5px;
		}
		.tag {
		    max-height: 50px;
		    margin-bottom: 4px;
		}

		
		
		.watch-reserve-event-card{
			display: flex;
			margin: 20px 0 0 0;
			font-size: 16px;
			font-weight: bold;
			background: #FFF;
			border: 1px solid #CECECE;
			border-radius: 4px;
		}
		
		.watch-reserve-event-card .card-contents{
			width: 80%;
			padding: 10px 14px;
			color: #555;
		}
		
		.watch-reserve-label-area{
			display:flex;
			margin-bottom: 7px;
		}
		
		.holding-label{
			background-color: #00B2B2;
			color: #fff;
			display: flex;
			padding: 2px 6px;
			font-size: 12px;
			margin-right:4px;
		}
		
		.watch-reserve-event-name{
			text-decoration: none;
			color: inherit;
		}
		
		
		.watching-reserve-btn-area{
			margin-block: auto;
			padding: 25px 18px 25px 22px;
			border-left: 1px solid #CECECE;
		}
		
		.watching-reserve-btn {
			display: inline-block;
			width: 100px;
			padding: 10px;
			background: #FFF;
			text-align: center;
			color: #00B2B2;
			text-decoration: none;
			border: 1px solid;
			border-radius: 4px;
			white-space: nowrap;
		}
		
		.watching-reserve-btn:hover {
			background: #00B2B2;
			color: #FFF;
		}
		
		@media screen and (max-width: 1239px) {
			
			.watch-reserve-event-card .card-contents {
				width: 74%;
			}
		}
		.button-tri-right {
			margin-top: 5px;
			color: #555;
			background-color: #F5F5F5;
			background-image: url(/assets/pc/images/icon_btn_triangle.png);
			background-repeat: no-repeat;
			background-size: 6px 6px;
			background-position: right 5px top 50%;
		}
		.button-tri-right:hover {
			transition: all 0.25s ease 0s;
			background-color: #F0F0F0;
		}		
		
		.pickup-company-contents {
			max-width: 950px;
			margin: 0 auto;
			display: flex;
			justify-content: center;
			gap: 30px 30px;
			flex-wrap: wrap;
		}
		.pickup-company-tag-pr {
			position: absolute;
			background: #ddd;
			color: #222222;
			font-weight: bold;
			margin: -10px;
			padding: 1px 12px;
		}
		.pickup-company-contents-item {
			width: 180px;
			background-color: #fff;
			display: flex;
			flex-direction: column;
			box-shadow: 0px 5px 12px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
			padding: 10px;
		}
		.pickup-company-main-contents {
			margin-top: 10px;
			display: flex;
			flex-direction: column;
			gap: 10px;
		}
		.pickup-company-logo-image {
			display: block;
			width: 100%;
			height: 180px;
		}

		
		.event-main-image,
		.event-card-no-photo {
			height: 123.3px;
			min-height: initial;
		}
		@media screen and (max-width: 1239px) {
			.event-contents-item{
				max-width: 355px !important;
			}
			.event-main-image,
			.event-card-no-photo {
				height: 145.9px;
			}
			.event-operation-button,
			.disabled-event-operation-button {
				width: 41%;
			}
		}
		
		
		.recruitment-card-list::after {
			content: "";
			display: block;
			width: 300px;
		}
		.recruitment-card-list .recruitment-card .label-tag{
			font-size: 16px;
		}
		.recruitment-card-main-content .recruitment-card-view-btn {
			font-size: 16px;
		}
		.recruitment-card {
			background-color: white;
			box-sizing: border-box;
			float: left;
			width: 300px;
			margin-bottom: 25px;
		}
		.recruitment-card:nth-child(even) {
		  margin-right: 0;
		}
		.recruitment-card-main-content{
			position: relative;
		}
		.recruitment-card-contents-job-photo {
			min-height: 146.88px;
		}
		.before-height:before{
			content: "";
			display: block;
			padding-top: 0;
		}
		.recruitment-entry-btn{
			bottom: 0px;
		    left: 0;
		    margin: auto;
		    overflow: hidden;
		    padding-top: 5px;
		    right: 0;
		}
		@media screen and (max-width: 1239px) {
			.recruitment-card {
				margin:0 20px 20px 0;
				width: 355px !important;
			}
		}

		
		
		.article-area h3 {
			font-size: 24px;
			text-align: center;
			color: #555;
			margin-bottom: 10px;
		}
		
		.article-list {
			display: flex;
			flex-wrap: wrap;
			justify-content: space-between;
			row-gap: 20px;
		}
		
		.article-card {
			background: #FFFFFF 0% 0% no-repeat padding-box;
			box-shadow: 0px 3px 6px #00000029;
			border-radius: 4px;
			width: 30%;
			position: relative;
		}
		.article-card a {
			display: block;
			padding: 10px;
			color: #555;
			text-decoration: none;
		}
		
		.article-list::after {
			content: "";
			display: block;
			width: 30%;
		}
		
		.article-card a dl {
			display: flex;
			column-gap: 2px;
			align-items: center;
		}
		
		.article-thumbnail img {
			width: var(--article-thumbnail-size);
			height: var(--article-thumbnail-size);
		}
		
		.article-title {
			/* .article-cardのwidth - article-thumbnailのwidth */
			width: calc(100% - var(--article-thumbnail-size));
			display: -webkit-box;
			-webkit-line-clamp: 3;
			-webkit-box-orient: vertical;
			overflow: hidden;
		}
		
		.company-tag-list {
			margin-top: 5px;
			overflow: hidden;
			line-height: 1em;
			
			height: calc(1em + var(--company-tag-vertical-padding) *2);
		}
		
		.article-card .company-tag {
			background-color: #181878;
			color: #fff;
			padding: var(--company-tag-vertical-padding) var(--company-tag-side-padding);
			font-size: 11px;
			font-weight: 700;
			overflow: hidden;
			white-space: nowrap;
			text-overflow: ellipsis;
			display: inline-block;
			vertical-align: top;
		}
		
		.article-card .company-tag.hidden-tag {
			display: none;
		}
		
		.article-card .company-tag.only-tag-width {
			
			max-width: calc(100% - var(--company-tag-side-padding) *2);
		}
		
		.article-card .company-tag.many-tag-width {
			
			max-width: calc(100% - var(--company-tag-side-padding) *2 - 4em);
			margin: 0 2px 2px 0;
		}
		
		.company-tag-count {
			position: absolute;
			bottom: 5px;
			right: 5px;
			font-size: 11px;
			font-weight: 700;
			text-decoration: underline;
		}
		
		.line-orange {
			width: 120px;
			height: 2px;
			background: #D64531 0% 0% no-repeat padding-box;
			border-style: none;
		}
		
		#second-slider,
		#second-slider .swiper-container {
		  height: 340px;
		  width: 840px;
		}
		@media screen and (max-width: 1239px) {
			#second-slider,
			#second-slider .swiper-container {
				height: 290px;
				width: 730px;
			}
			#second-slider .photo img {
				height: 290px !important;
				width: 730px !important;
			}
		}

		
		#mainSearchArea {
		}
		#mainSearchTab {
			font-size: 0;
			color: #00b2b2;
			font-weight: bold;
		}
		.tabSearchCondition {
			display: flex;
			flex-direction: row;
			justify-content: space-between;
		}
		.tabSearchConditionItem {
			width: 49%;
		}
		#mainSearchTabEvent,
		#mainSearchTabRecruitment,
		#mainSearchTabAi {
			width: 33%;
			height: 33px;
			font-size: 21px;
			line-height: 36px;
			text-align: center;
			display: inline-block;
			border-bottom: solid 3px;
			cursor: pointer;
		}
		#mainSearchTab div.inactive {
			font-size: 22px !important;
			color: #c0c0c0 !important;
			vertical-align: bottom;
		}
		#mainSearchInput {
			font-size: 15px;
			margin: 24px 0 0 0;
			text-align: center;
		}
		#mainSearchIcon {
			width: 44px;
			height: 46px;
			float: left;
			text-align: center;
			background-color: white;
			color: white;
			padding: 0 0 0 2px;
			border-radius: 4px 0 0 4px;
			border: solid 2px #BBB;
			border-right: none;
		}
		#eventSearchText,
		#recruitmentSearchText,
		#aiSearchText {
			height: 44px;
			width: calc(100% - 54px);
			border: solid 2px #BBB;
			border-left: none;
			display: block;
			outline: 0;
			border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
			margin-bottom: 10px;
		}
		#mainSearchBusiness {
			height: 44px;
			width: 680px;
			border: solid 2px #BBB;
			border-left: none;
			display: block;
			padding: 1px 0 1px 0;
			outline: 0;
			border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
			margin-bottom: 10px;
		}
		#mainSearchButton {
			height: 35px;
			width: 120px;
			font-size: 16px;
			color: white;
			background-color: #00b2b2;
			border: none;
			border-radius: 4px;
			outline: 0;
			cursor: pointer;
			font-weight: bold;
		}
		#mainSearchButton:hover {
			background-color: #00a8a8;
		}
		#eventTabSearchCondition{
			margin-top: 12px;
		}
		#eventTabSearchCondition select{
			font-size: 15px;
			border-radius: 4px;
			padding: 5px 5px 5px 12px;
			box-sizeing: border-box;
			width: 100%;
			height: 50px;
			border: solid 2px #BBB;
			color: #444444;
		}
		#recruitmentTabSearchCondition{
			margin-top: 12px;
		}
		.event-type-wrapper {
			min-height: 30px;
			margin: 10px;
			text-align: left;
		}
		.event-type {
			margin: 0 15px 10px 0;
			font-size: 14px;
			display: inline-block;
		}
		#recruitmentTabSearchCondition select{
			font-size: 15px;
			border-radius: 4px;
			padding: 5px 5px 5px 12px;
			box-sizeing: border-box;
			width: 100%;
			height: 50px;
			border: solid 2px #BBB;
			color: #444444;
		}
		#recruitmentTabSearchCondition select:focus {
			outline: 0;
			border: none;
			padding: 7px 7px 7px 14px;
			box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #00B2B2;
		}
		.search-area-left {
			padding: 20px;
		}
		#pickupWordEventArea,
		#pickupWordCompanyArea,
		#pickupWordRecruitmentArea {
			overflow: hidden;
		}
		#pickupWordEventArea,
		#pickupWordCompanyArea,
		#pickupWordRecruitmentArea {
			display: none;
		}
		#recruitmentTabSearchCondition {
			display: none;
			justify-content: space-between;
			flex-wrap: wrap;
		}
		#eventTabSearchCondition {
			display: none;
			justify-content: space-between;
			flex-wrap: wrap;
		}
		#pickupWordArea {
			padding-top: 0;
		}
		#pickupWordArea a {
			padding: 5px 10px;
			margin: 5px 7px;
			display: block;
			float: left;
			color: #00b2b2;
			background-color: #ebffff;
			text-decoration: none;
			font-weight: bold;
			border-radius: 3px;
			border: solid 1px #00b2b2;
			cursor: pointer;
		}
		#pickupWordArea a:hover {
			color: #ebffff;
			background-color: #00b2b2;
		}
		#pickupWord {
			position: absolute;
			top: -10px;
			left: 55px;
			background: #F8F8F8;
			font-weight: bold;
			padding: 0 5px 0 0;
		}
		#recruitmentSearchTab {
			display: none;
			font-weight: 500;
			margin-bottom: 15px;
			height:32px;
		}
		#recruitmentSearchTab div {
			display: block;
			padding: 5px 20px;
			font-size: 14px;
			background: #00b2b2;
			color: #fff;
			background: #eee;
			color: #bbb;
			cursor: pointer;
			border: 1px solid #bbb;
		}
		#recruitmentSearchTab div.active {
			background: #00b2b2;
			color: #fff;
			font-weight: bold;
		}
		#recruitmentSearchTabCompany {
			border-radius: 0 3px 3px 0;
			border-left: none !important;
		}

    font-size: 10px;
    color: #555;
}

.participation-heading-twin::before,
.participation-heading-twin::after {
    position: absolute;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    content: "";
    border-top: 1px solid #555;
}

.participation-heading-twin::before {
    left: 0%;
    width: 35%;
}

.participation-heading-twin::after {
    right: 0%;
    width: 35%;
}

        gap: 10px;

    }
}

    <script>
    /*<![CDATA[*/

    // メイン検索ボタンのクリック処理
    $('#mainSearchButton').on('click', function() {
        if ($('#mainSearchInput').attr('action') == "\/search\/") {
            $('#recruitmentSearchText').prop('disabled', true);
            $('#aiSearchText').prop('disabled', true);
            $('#selectBusinessRecruitment').prop('disabled', true);
            $('input[name="recruitmentStatus"]:radio').filter(":checked").prop('disabled', true);
        }
        else if ($('#mainSearchInput').attr('action') == "\/recruitment\/") {
            $('#eventSearchText').prop('disabled', true);
            $('#aiSearchText').prop('disabled', true);
            $('#selectBusinessEvent').prop('disabled', true);
            $('input[name="eventTypeList"]').each(function() {
                $(this).prop('disabled', true);
            });
        }
        else if ($('#mainSearchInput').attr('action') == "\/ai-search\/") {
            $('#selectBusinessRecruitment').prop('disabled', true);
            $('input[name="recruitmentStatus"]:radio').filter(":checked").prop('disabled', true);
            $('#eventSearchText').prop('disabled', true);
            $('#recruitmentSearchText').prop('disabled', true);
            $('#selectBusinessEvent').prop('disabled', true);
            $('input[name="eventTypeList"]').each(function() {
                $(this).prop('disabled', true);
            $('input[name="recruitmentStatus"]:radio').filter(":checked").prop('disabled', true);
            });
        }
        var form = $(this).parents('form');
        var action = $(this).attr('data-url');
        form.attr('action', action);
        form.submit();
    });

    // タブ切替処理
    $('#mainSearchTabEvent').on('click', function() {
        $('#mainSearchTabEvent').removeClass('inactive');
        $('#mainSearchTabRecruitment').addClass('inactive');
        $('#mainSearchTabAi').addClass('inactive');
        $('#mainSearchButton').attr('data-url', "\/search\/");
        $('#mainSearchInput').attr('action', "\/search\/");
        $('#eventTabSearchCondition').css('display', 'block');
        $('#recruitmentTabSearchCondition').css('display', 'none');
        $('#aiTabSearchCondition').css('display', 'none');
        $('#pickupWordEventArea').css('display', 'block');
        $('#pickupWordRecruitmentArea').css('display', 'none');
    });

    $('#mainSearchTabRecruitment').on('click', function() {
        $('#mainSearchTabEvent').addClass('inactive');
        $('#mainSearchTabRecruitment').removeClass('inactive');
        $('#mainSearchTabAi').addClass('inactive');
        $('#mainSearchButton').attr('data-url', "\/recruitment\/");
        $('#mainSearchInput').attr('action', "\/recruitment\/");
        $('#eventTabSearchCondition').css('display', 'none');
        $('#aiTabSearchCondition').css('display', 'none');
        $('#recruitmentTabSearchCondition').css('display', 'block');
        $('#pickupWordEventArea').css('display', 'none');
        $('#pickupWordRecruitmentArea').css('display', 'block');
    });

    $('#mainSearchTabAi').on('click', function() {
        $('#mainSearchTabAi').removeClass('inactive');
        $('#mainSearchTabRecruitment').addClass('inactive');
        $('#mainSearchTabEvent').addClass('inactive');
        $('#mainSearchButton').attr('data-url', "\/ai-search\/");
        $('#mainSearchInput').attr('action', "\/ai-search\/");
        $('#aiTabSearchCondition').css('display', 'block');
        $('#eventTabSearchCondition').css('display', 'none');
        $('#recruitmentTabSearchCondition').css('display', 'none');
        $('#pickupWordEventArea').css('display', 'none');
        $('#pickupWordRecruitmentArea').css('display', 'none');
    });


    // ピックアップワードリンクのクリック処理
	$(document).on('click', '.pickupWordEventLink', function () {
        var url = "\/search\/?searchWord=";
        url += encodeURIComponent($(this).text());
        location.href = url;
    });
	$(document).on('click', '.pickupWordCompanyLink', function () {
        var url = "\/company\/?searchWord=";
        url += encodeURIComponent($(this).text());
        location.href = url;
    });
	$(document).on('click', '.pickupWordRecruitmentLink', function () {
        var url = "\/recruitment\/?searchWord=";
        url += encodeURIComponent($(this).text());
        location.href = url;
    });
    
    /**
     * 特定のposition（extras）を持つBrazeカードを取得する
     */
    const getCardsByPosition = (cards, position) => {
        // ★【修正】cardsが配列でない場合は空配列を返してエラーを防ぐ安全ガードを追加
        if (!Array.isArray(cards)) return [];
        return cards.filter(card => card.extras && card.extras['position'] === position);
    };

    /**
     * Braze SDK読み込み
     */
    const waitForBraze = (callback) => {
        if (typeof braze !== 'undefined') {
            callback();
        } else {
            let retryCount = 0;
            const retryInterval = setInterval(() => {
                retryCount++;
                if (typeof braze !== 'undefined') {
                    clearInterval(retryInterval);
                    callback();
                } else if (retryCount >= 10) {
                    clearInterval(retryInterval);
                }
            }, 200);
        }
    };

    /**
     * Brazeのクリック計測を行い、指定時間後に遷移する
     */
    const logBrazeClickAndRedirect = (card, targetUrl) => {
        if (typeof braze === 'undefined' || !card) return;
        
        braze.logContentCardClick(card);
        if (typeof braze.requestImmediateDataFlush === 'function') {
            braze.requestImmediateDataFlush();
        }

        if (targetUrl && targetUrl !== 'javascript:void(0);') {
            setTimeout(function() {
                window.location.href = targetUrl;
            }, 1500);
        }
    };

    // スライダー関連スクリプト
    var swiper = new Swiper("#first-slider .swiper-container", {
        pagination: '.first-swiper-pagination',
        paginationClickable: true,
        nextButton: '.first-swiper-next',
        prevButton: '.first-swiper-prev',
        autoplay: 7400,
        loop: true,
        speed: 600,
        autoplayDisableOnInteraction: false
    });

    // --- Brazeコンテンツカード（スライド & フリースペース ）---
    (function() {
        let isBrazeBannerAdded = false;
        let isSwiperRevealed = false;
        let isFreespaceAdded = false;

        // メインビジュアルの表示切り替え
        const revealSwiper = () => {
            if (isSwiperRevealed) return;
            if (!$('#first-slider').hasClass('is-visible')) {
                $('#first-slider').addClass('is-visible');
                isSwiperRevealed = true;
            }
        };

        // メインビジュアル（top）
        const processTopCards = (cards) => {
            if (isBrazeBannerAdded) return;
            
            const topCards = getCardsByPosition(cards, 'top');
            
            if (topCards.length === 0) {
                revealSwiper();
                return;
            }
            
            const topCard = topCards.reduce((max, card) => {
                const priority = parseInt(card.extras.priority ?? 0, 10);
                const maxPriority = parseInt(max.extras?.priority ?? 0, 10);
                return priority > maxPriority ? card : max;
            });

            if (topCard) {
                const imageUrl = topCard.extras['image_url'] || topCard.imageUrl;
                const linkUrl = topCard.extras['url'] || topCard.url;
                if (imageUrl) {
                    isBrazeBannerAdded = true; 
                    const newSlideHtml = `
                        <div class="swiper-slide braze-added">
                            <span>
                                <a href="${linkUrl || 'javascript:void(0);'}" class="js-braze-click">
                                    <div class="photo">
                                        <img src="${imageUrl}" class="main-visual" alt="Braze Banner">
                                    </div>
                                </a>
                            </span>
                        </div>`;
                    swiper.prependSlide(newSlideHtml);
                    if (swiper.params.loop) swiper.reLoop();
                    swiper.update();
                    swiper.slideTo(1, 0);
                    braze.logContentCardImpressions([topCard]);

                    $(document).off('click.braze').on('click.braze', '.js-braze-click', function(e) {
                        e.preventDefault();
                        e.stopPropagation();
                        const targetUrl = $(this).attr('href');
                        logBrazeClickAndRedirect(topCard, targetUrl);
                    });
                }
            }
            revealSwiper();
        };

        // フリースペース（top-freespace）
        const processFreespaceCards = (cards) => {
            if (isFreespaceAdded) return;

            const targetCards = getCardsByPosition(cards, 'top-freespace');
            if (targetCards.length === 0) return;

            const processedPositions = {
                'braze-slot-left': false,
                'braze-slot-right': false
            };

            targetCards.forEach((card) => {
                const order = card.extras['order'];
                const imageUrl = card.extras['image'] || card.imageUrl;
                const linkUrl = card.extras['url'] || card.url;
             	// orderの値によって入れる場所を判定
                let targetId = "";
                if (order == "left") targetId = "braze-slot-left";
                if (order == "right") targetId = "braze-slot-right";

                if (!targetId || processedPositions[targetId]) return;

                const container = document.getElementById(targetId);
                
                if (container && imageUrl) {
                    container.innerHTML = `
                        <a href="${linkUrl || 'javascript:void(0);'}" class="js-freespace-click" data-card-id="${card.id}">
                            <img src="${imageUrl}" width="100%" border="0" style="display:block;">
                        </a>`;
	                    
                     // 表示の計測
                    braze.logContentCardImpressions([card]);

                    processedPositions[targetId] = true;
                }
            });

            isFreespaceAdded = true;

         	// クリック処理
            const mainBox = document.getElementById('braze-freespace-banner');
            if (mainBox) {
                $(mainBox).off('click.freespace').on('click.freespace', '.js-freespace-click', function(e) {
                    const cardId = $(this).data('card-id');
                    const clickedCard = targetCards.find(c => c.id === cardId);

                    if (clickedCard) {
                        const targetUrl = $(this).attr('href');
                        if (targetUrl !== 'javascript:void(0);') {
                            e.preventDefault();
                            e.stopPropagation();
                            logBrazeClickAndRedirect(clickedCard, targetUrl);
                        }
                    }
                });
            }
        };

        // Brazeコンテンツカード全体の初期化と通信制御
        const initBrazeContentCards = () => {
            if (typeof braze === 'undefined') return;

         	// コンテンツカード取得後に各表示エリアを更新
            braze.subscribeToContentCardsUpdates(function(cardsUpdates) {
                const currentCards = cardsUpdates ? cardsUpdates.cards : [];
                processTopCards(currentCards);
                processFreespaceCards(currentCards);
            });

         // Brazeのレート制限対策（30秒以内の再取得を抑制）
            const now = Date.now();
            const lastRefresh = sessionStorage.getItem('braze_last_cc_refresh');
            const refreshInterval = 30000; 

            if (!lastRefresh || (now - parseInt(lastRefresh, 10) > refreshInterval)) {
                braze.requestContentCardsRefresh();
                sessionStorage.setItem('braze_last_cc_refresh', now.toString());
            } else {
                // 30秒以内なら、SDK内のローカルキャッシュを使って即座に描画
                if (typeof braze.getCachedContentCards === 'function') {
                    const cachedContentCardsObj = braze.getCachedContentCards();
                    const cachedCards = (cachedContentCardsObj && cachedContentCardsObj.cards) ? cachedContentCardsObj.cards : [];
                    
                    processTopCards(cachedCards);
                    processFreespaceCards(cachedCards);
                }
            }
        };

        waitForBraze(initBrazeContentCards);
        
     	// タイムアウト用
        setTimeout(() => {
            revealSwiper(); 
        }, 2500);
    })();

    var swiper2 = new Swiper("#second-slider .swiper-container", {
        pagination: '.second-swiper-pagination',
        paginationClickable: true,
        autoplay: 3400,
        loop: true,
        speed: 600,
        autoplayDisableOnInteraction: false
    });

    $(".swiper-slide").click(function() {
        if ($(this).hasClass('braze-added')) return false;
        window.location = $(this).find("a").attr("href");
        return false;
    });

    $(".card").matchHeight();

    window.onload = function() {
        $(".main-content-size-just").matchHeight();
    };

    $('.link-js').on('click', function() {
        location.href = $(this).attr('data-url');
    });

    /*]]>*/
    </script>

		
	<script>
		/*<![CDATA[*/
		$(function() {
			const modalRecommendUrl = "\/modal-recommend\/";
            
            // ページロード時にAjax通信を行い、モーダルを開くかどうかを判断
		    modalRecommendAjax(modalRecommendUrl, function(data) {
		        // Ajaxの返り値がnullまたは空でない場合にのみモーダルを開く
		        if (data && data.trim().length > 0) {
		            // モーダルを開く
		            $(".modal-recommend-open").modaal({
		                start_open: false, // ページロード時にモーダルは開かない
		                before_open: function() {
		                    // モーダルの内容を設定
		                    $('#modal-recommend').html(data);
		                    $('.modaal-content-container').html(data);
		                    $('.modaal-inner-wrapper').css({ 'cursor': 'auto' });
		                }
		            });
		            $(".modal-recommend-open").modaal('open');  // Ajax成功後にモーダルを開く
		        } else {
		            return;
		        }
		    });
		
			// モーダルレコメンドAjax
			function modalRecommendAjax(modalRecommendUrl, callback) {
			    $.ajax({
			        type: "GET",
			        url: modalRecommendUrl,
			        dataType: "html",
			        success: function(data) {
			            callback(data); // データをコールバックで返す
			        },
			        error: function(XMLHttpRequest, status, errorThrown) {
			            console.log("Error: " + errorThrown);
			            callback(null); // エラーの場合はnullを返す
			        }
			    });
			}
		});
    /*]]>*/
	</script>

	<div id="footer-recommend-area"></div>
	
    <script>
        /*<![CDATA[*/
        $(function () {
            const baseRecommendUrl = "\/recommend\/open\/";
            const displayPageCls = getPageClass();

            if (!displayPageCls) return;

            const requestData = buildRequestData(displayPageCls);
            const encodedRequestData = encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(requestData));
            // ページロード時にAjax通信を行い、モーダルを開くかどうかを判断
            fetchModalContent(baseRecommendUrl, encodedRequestData);

            // モーダルの内容を取得して表示
            function fetchModalContent(url, data) {
                $.ajax({
                    type: "GET",
                    url: url,
                    data: { requestData: data },
                    contentType: "application/json",
                    dataType: "html",
                    success: function (response) {
                        if (response?.trim()) {
                            $('#footer-recommend-area').html(response);
                        }
                    },
                    error: function (xhr, status, error) {
                        console.error("Error fetching modal content:", error);
                    }
                });
            }

            // リクエストデータを構築
            function buildRequestData(pageCls) {
                const data = { 
					displayPageCls: pageCls,
					url : window.location.href
                 };

                switch (pageCls) {
                    case "1":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            schoolYear: $('[name="schoolYear"]').val(),
                            eventTypeList: getCheckedValues("eventTypeList"),
                            regionClsList: getCheckedValues("regionClsList"),
                            business: $('[name="business"]').val()
                        });
                    case "2":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            eventId: getUrlId("/event/"),
                            webinarId: getQueryParam('webinarId')
                        });
                    case "3":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            schoolYear: $('[name="schoolYear"]').val(),
                            recruitmentStatus: $('[name="recruitmentStatus"][type="hidden"]').val(),
                            business: $('[name="business"]').val()
                        });
                    case "4":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            recruitmentId: getUrlId("/recruitment/")
                        });
                    case "5":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            business: $('[name="business"]').val()
                        });
                    case "6":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            companyId: getUrlId("/company/")
                        });
                    case "7":
                        return Object.assign(data, {
                            eventId: getUrlId("/event/"),
                            companyId: getUrlId("/company/")
                        });
                    default:
                        return data;
                }
            }

            // URLの指定された部分からIDを抽出
            function getUrlId(pattern) {
                const url = window.location.href;
                const match = url.match(new RegExp(pattern + "(\\d+)"));
                return match ? match[1] : null;
            }

            // クエリパラメータから値を取得
            function getQueryParam(param) {
                const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
                return urlParams.get(param);
            }

            // チェックボックスの値を取得
            function getCheckedValues(selector) {
                return $(`[name="${selector}"]:checked`).map(function () {
                    return $(this).val();
                }).get();
            }

            // ページクラスを判定
            function getPageClass() {
                const path = window.location.pathname.replace(/^\/web-user/, '');
                const patterns = {
                    "0": /^\/$/,                          // トップページ
                    "1": /^\/search\/.*/,                // イベント一覧
                    "2": /^\/event\/[0-9]+\/$/,          // イベント詳細（CDC主催）
                    "3": /^\/recruitment\/.*/,           // 募集要項一覧
                    "4": /^\/company\/[0-9]+\/recruitment\/[0-9]+\/$/, // 募集要項詳細
                    "5": /^\/company\/(?![0-9])/,        // 企業一覧
                    "6": /^\/company\/[0-9]+\/$/,        // 企業詳細
                    "7": /^\/company\/[0-9]+\/event\/[0-9]+\/$/ // イベント詳細（企業主催）
                };

                for (const [key, regex] of Object.entries(patterns)) {
                    if (regex.test(path)) return key;
                }
                return ""; // 該当なし
            }

            // おすすめクローズ処理
            $('#footer-recommend-area').on("click", ".recommend-close", function () {
                const $targetArea = $(this).closest('.recommend-area');
                closeRecommend($targetArea);
                return false;
            });

            // おすすめクローズ処理（Ajax送信）
            function closeRecommend(target) {
                const data = {
                    targetId: $('#target-id').val(),
                    targetPageCls: $('#target-page-cls').val(),
                    displayPageCls: $('#display-page-cls').val(),
                    recommendSetId: $('#recommend-set-id').val()
                };

                const url = $('#recommend-close').attr('action');
                const method = $('#recommend-close').attr('method');

                $.ajax({
                    url: url,
                    type: method,
                    data: $.param(data),
                    success: function () {
                        target.hide();
                    },
                    error: function (xhr, status, error) {
                        console.error("Error closing recommend area:", error);
                    }
                });
            }
        });
        /*]]>*/
    </script>
